texto: Times were changing. Clothes were changing. Morals were changing. We went from romantic loves songs like I used to do to rock 'n roll. Now that has changed to rap. So, there's always a new generation with new music.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Bobby Vinton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Times were changing. Clothes were changing. Morals were changing. We went from romantic loves son…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, romantic, generation pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e generation.
